children.text: 123 Example Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85260
Mon–Fri: 7am–8pm · Sat: 8am–7pm

I have been baking for a long time, but that doesn't mean that you need a ton of experience to follow my recipes. I work to make my recipes interesting for advanced cooks but still accessible for beginners.

I approach baking with an emphasis on family-friendly snacks and the tastiest ways to eat healthy together! When not in my kitchen, I'm often hiking in the mountains around my home and exploring the best food locations in America.

Food has a special ability to bring people together. I often find this in my own life and I hope you will find that this online community feels just as welcoming as a real kitchen. For me, baking together builds the best communities, let's get baking together!
The Story of a Bakery
Bakery Café, established by Eugenia Theodosopoulos and Gilles Combes

who met and married in Paris, is an elegant, casual dining experience—a place to eat well while talking with friends, meeting with colleagues, or celebrating with family. At Bakery, ingredients rule the kitchen and the cooking. Chef Eugenia starts by hand-selecting only the finest, freshest, quality ingredients—this essential beginning results in thoughtfully created and perfectly prepared organic dishes, pastries, and desserts. Unique and familiar flavors mingle in new ways and delight the palate.
Buy local. Eat well. Preserve the Planet

—three commitments that live in the hearts of Eugenia and Gilles and guide their mission. Environmental sustainability practices are infused in all facets of the bakery-café. Dishes and pastries require the freshest, organic-whenever-possible ingredients and are designed around local and in-season foods.
Bakery, especially known for its Parisian Macarons, won the "Best of the internet" award within its first nine months of operation—for both the macaron and the restaurant.

Our assortment of fresh-made cakes will make your mouth water. There's so much variety and each cake is completely unique and absolutely delicious. Come in, have a slice – or take the whole cake home. We also take special orders, get in touch to order a cake.
Occasion Cakes
Hazelnut Cake — $10
Delicate, flourless hazelnut cake, completely gluten free – and tasty
Orange Cake — $30
Yellow cake with white frosting, topped with white cream
Chocolate Cake — $10
Decadence in chocolate form, exquisite dark chocolate in every form
Chocolate Mousse — $30
Chocolate layers of cake and mousse, covered in chocolate ganache
Raspberry Cake — $20
Yellow cake with white frosting, topped with fresh raspberries
Lemon Pound — $20
A modern spin on an all time classic, topped with fresh lemon curd
Fruit Tarts
Mixed Fruit — $30
Tart shell, custard, strawberry, kiwi, blueberry, cherries, and apricot glaze
Mango Raspberry — $30
Tart shell, custard, mango, raspberry, cherries, and apricot glaze
Kiwi Strawberry — $30
Tart shell, custard, kiwi, strawberries, cherries, and apricot glaze
Lemon Raspberry — $30
Tart shell, custard, lemon, raspberry, cherries, and apricot glaze
Questions, Inquiries?

Thank you for your inquiry about Lucy's Bakery, proudly setting the gold standard for bakeries in our community. Our guests rightfully expect the most delicious cakes around, baked with love and kindness.
Lucy's Bakery
123 Example Rd, Scottsdale, AZ 85260
Hours
Monday – Friday: 11am – 8pm
Saturday – Sunday: 11am – 10:30pm
